hooks.command: p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave is done'

p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave has a question for you'

p=$(pgrep -x dunst | head -1); [ -n "$p" ] && export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=$(tr '\0' '\n' </proc/$p/environ | sed -n 's/^DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=//p'); dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave needs your permission'
